problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
